ns0:entry.ns0:title: Free-TV/IPTV
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Free-TV/IPTV
Language: python
M3U Playlist for free TV channels

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LMCache/LMCache
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LMCache/LMCache
Language: python
LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LibreTranslate/LibreTranslate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LibreTranslate/LibreTranslate
Language: python
Free and Open Source Machine Translation API. Self-hosted, offline capable and easy to setup.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lightricks/LTX-2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2
Language: python
Official Python inference and LoRA trainer package for the LTX-2 audio–video generative model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MODSetter/SurfSense
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MODSetter/SurfSense
Language: python
An open source, privacy focused alternative to NotebookLM for teams with no data limits. Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/ejRNvftDp9

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/SkillSpector
Language: python
Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
Language: python
Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: andrewyng/aisuite
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/andrewyng/aisuite
Language: python
Simple, unified interface to multiple Generative AI providers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: calesthio/OpenMontage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/calesthio/OpenMontage
Language: python
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-research/timesfm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-research/timesfm
Language: python
TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/agents-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/agents-cli
Language: python
The CLI and skills that turn any coding assistant into an expert at creating, evaluating, and deploying AI agents on Google Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/presidio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/presidio
Language: python
An open-source framework for detecting, redacting, masking, and anonymizing sensitive data (PII) across text, images, and structured data. Supports NLP, pattern matching, and customizable pipelines.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: music-assistant/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/music-assistant/server
Language: python
Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pytest-dev/pytest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pytest-dev/pytest
Language: python
The pytest framework makes it easy to write small tests, yet scales to support complex functional testing

ns0:entry.ns0:title: smicallef/spiderfoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/smicallef/spiderfoot
Language: python
SpiderFoot automates OSINT for threat intelligence and mapping your attack surface.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stanford-oval/storm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stanford-oval/storm
Language: python
An LLM-powered knowledge curation system that researches a topic and generates a full-length report with citations.
